Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ashwind continent]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Wandering Titan is entering the southern jungles of the Ashwind continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Ashwind continent is home to dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Tower of Seven Moons is a relic of the southern Ashwind continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Ashwind continent is a place people wish to be free of to return to the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Moongrave is located on the Ashwind continent.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Ashwind continent is associated with wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Weeping Dragon's clouds approach the Ashwind continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Ashwind Continent has a Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Akura Malice would burn the Ashwind continent to the ground rather than surrender.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
